title: DEXTER FOOD PANTRY - 211info
text: DEXTER FOOD PANTRY DEXTER FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency food boxes, seasonal produce, and a clothing closet. 38925 Dexter Road Dexter, OR 97431 Eligibility: Must meet USDA income guidelines Hours: 1st and 3rd Tuesday of the month 1pm-6pm Email (541) 937-4229 Get Directions Phone/FAX Numbers Message Phone (541) 937-4229 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Dexter, Jasper, and Pleasant Hill TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Highway 58 to Dexter exit. Approximately 2 miles to St. Henry Catholic Church on the left side of road. Pantry is on the side of the hall. Services: Food Pantries Fresh Food General Clothing Provision If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
